import os, subprocess, sys
configs = [
    {'SEED':'6', 'WIN_START':'530', 'WIN_END':'620', 'EPOCHS':'5', 'LR':'1e-4', 'SAVE_PATH':'checkpoints/ensemble2/seed6.pt'},
    {'SEED':'7', 'WIN_START':'530', 'WIN_END':'620', 'EPOCHS':'5', 'LR':'1e-4', 'SAVE_PATH':'checkpoints/ensemble2/seed7.pt'},
    {'SEED':'8', 'WIN_START':'530', 'WIN_END':'620', 'EPOCHS':'5', 'LR':'1e-4', 'SAVE_PATH':'checkpoints/ensemble2/seed8.pt'},
]
os.makedirs('checkpoints/ensemble2', exist_ok=True)
for cfg in configs:
    env = os.environ.copy()
    env.update(cfg)
    env['MODEL'] = '150M'
    print('=== Training', cfg)
    r = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'train.py'], env=env)
    if r.returncode != 0:
        print('FAILED', cfg); sys.exit(1)
print('All done')
